description_long: This is a modern floor lamp with a slender vertical pole mounted on a round, flat base. The lamp features two spherical light fixtures, each suspended at different heights and extending horizontally from the central pole on short arms. The globes are smooth and likely made of frosted or matte glass, providing diffused illumination. The pole and base appear to be constructed from metal, giving the lamp a sturdy and contemporary look. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a balanced symmetry, making it suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. There are no visible switches or cords, suggesting integrated or touch-sensitive controls.
description: A sleek, modern floor lamp with two spherical glass globes on a metal pole and round base, featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both spherical globes at different heights and the central pole with the round base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment of the globes and the thinness of the pole, with both globes visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the globes' positions relative to the pole and the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the globes' horizontal extension and the pole's slender profile.
